name: Bubbies Chicken Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chicken in the pot and cover with water.
2. Bring to a boil, then skim off any foam.
3. Add the chopped vegetables (onion, celery, parsnip, carrot) and reduce heat to maintain a gentle simmer.
4. Keep the lid slightly askew and season to taste. The soup is wonderful and freezes well.
5. Optionally, add rice or noodles just before serving, along with matzo balls if desired.
This recipe remains faithful to the original while improving clarity and consistency in presentation.
